title: ligularia yesoensis var. sutchuenensis
intro: Ligularia yesoensis var. sutchuenensis, also known as Sutchuen Ligularia, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Ligularia yesoensis var. sutchuenensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting digestive health and immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
